channel.title: helm on yy小站
channel.description: Recent content in helm on yy小站

item.title: k8s包管理器Helm
item.description: Helm官网 安装Helm 安装 1 2 3 4 5 curl https://baltocdn.com/helm/signing.asc | sudo apt-key add - sudo apt-get install apt-transport-https --yes echo "deb https://baltocdn.com/helm/stable/debian/ all main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/helm-stable-debian.list sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install helm 添加chart仓库，从Artifact Hub中
